ddls:
CREATE TABLE "temperature_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the temperature data was recorded */,
  "mean_temp" REAL /* Mean temperature for the day */,
  "min_temp" REAL /* Minimum temperature for the day */,
  "max_temp" REAL /* Maximum temperature for the day */,
  "temp_variance" REAL /* Variance of the temperature readings */,
  "std_error_mean" REAL /* Standard error of the mean temperature */,
  "num_points" INTEGER /* Number of data points collected */,
  "quality_flag" INTEGER /* Quality flag indicating the reliability of the data */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the sensor location */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Average humidity for the day */,
  "atmospheric_pressure" REAL /* Average atmospheric pressure for the day */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Average wind speed for the day */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Average wind direction for the day */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Amount of precipitation for the day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES sensor_locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_data_quality_flag FOREIGN KEY ("quality_flag") REFERENCES quality_flags ("quality_flag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name or description of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the sensor location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the sensor location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the sensor location */,
  "installed_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance or calibration of the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor used */,
  "sensor_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "sensor_model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each upload event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the temperature data being uploaded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the upload */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was uploaded */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file uploaded */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file uploaded */,
  "upload_status" TEXT /* Status of the upload */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the upload failed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES temperature_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for contact */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_flags" (
  "quality_flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality flag */,
  "flag_description" TEXT /* Description of the quality flag (e.g., reliable, questionable) */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the quality flag */,
  "recommended_action" TEXT /* Recommended action to improve data quality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_flag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the temperature data the report is based on */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report for quick reference */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_reports_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES temperature_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration event */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the external data source */,
  "integration_date" TEXT /* Date of the integration */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the temperature data linked to the integration */,
  "integration_type" TEXT /* Type of integration */,
  "integration_status" TEXT /* Status of the integration */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the integration failed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_integrations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES temperature_data ("data_id")
)
